svg.title: Public proof ledger
svg.desc: Live status of 10 Lean Pool contributions. Each row separates claim scope, Lean build checks, automated editorial review, formal human review, and pull request state.
svg.text: Lean build, automated review, human review, and PR state stay separate.
CONDITIONAL means the proof depends on named published inputs.
SCOPE PENDING is the default for a newly discovered pull request.
Source: public GitHub API and Vilin97/lean-pool.
